summary: Verified 3 new features: (1) Build from SEO Analysis with 'Build Better Version' button in Growth Panel, (2) LLM Intent Disambiguation with classifyIntentWithConfidence, (3) Prompt Template Extraction to prompt-builder.js. All backend syntax checks passed, service.js reduced to 2627 lines.

classifyIntentWithConfidence.exports: classifyIntentWithConfidence returns { intent, confidence, isAmbiguous, matchedIntents }

service_js_uses_confidence_scoring.behavior: Uses classifyIntentWithConfidence and triggers LLM disambiguation when confidence is low and isAmbiguous is true

growth_panel_onBuildBetter_prop.code: export default function GrowthPanel({ onClose, onFixIssue, onBuildBetter })

growth_build_better_button.condition: Shows when onBuildBetter is passed AND displayOpportunities has at least one issue

dashboard_onBuildBetter_callback.behavior: Closes Growth Panel, constructs rich prompt with page data + SEO issues, sends via sendMessage with 300ms delay

login_flow.details: Login successful via Supabase Auth (Enter key submission)

dashboard_load.details: Dashboard loads with prompt bar, project list, Growth button visible

growth_panel.details: Growth Panel opens with 51 pages crawled, page list, Analyze SEO button

growth_export_buttons.details: CSV and JSON export buttons present with correct data-testid attributes

seo_analysis.details: Analyze SEO generates 14 findings across issue sections (Title, Meta, Content, Structure, Recommendations)

build_better_version_button.details: Build Better Version button visible after SEO analysis with issues, data-testid='growth-build-better-btn'

fix_all_buttons.details: Fix all buttons rendered in section headers when items.length > 1

fix_it_buttons.details: Fix it buttons rendered on issue items

critical_code_review_comments: service.js successfully reduced from 3111 to 2627 lines by extracting prompt templates to prompt-builder.js
classifyIntentWithConfidence properly returns confidence scoring with 'high', 'medium', 'low' levels
LLM disambiguation only triggers when confidence is 'low' AND isAmbiguous is true - narrow path for truly ambiguous prompts
Build Better Version button correctly gated by onBuildBetter prop AND presence of SEO issues
Dashboard onBuildBetter callback constructs comprehensive prompt with URL, title, meta, word count, and all issues

success_rate.frontend: 100% (login, dashboard, Growth Panel, Build Better Version button all working)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 54 verified 3 new features: (1) Build from SEO Analysis with 'Build Better Version' button in Growth Panel that constructs rich prompt with competitor data + SEO issues, (2) LLM Intent Disambiguation via classifyIntentWithConfidence with confidence scoring, (3) Prompt Template Extraction to prompt-builder.js reducing service.js to 2627 lines. Frontend supervisor being FATAL is expected - only nextjs_api matters. Growth Panel has 51 pages crawled with working SEO analysis, Fix buttons, and Build Better Version button.
